meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills for Debugging Mastery
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills to crush debugging bottlenecks. An advanced guide for freelancers to ship faster using Antigravity and automated AI workflows.
content.answer_block: Stop wasting billable hours on complex debugging. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into an autonomous engineering partner. Use context-aware agents to scan, isolate, and patch regressions instantly, allowing you to focus on high-value feature delivery instead of chasing phantom bugs in legacy codebases.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your terminal is a graveyard of stack traces. You’ve been staring at the same logic error for three hours, and the cognitive load is killing your velocity. This isn't just a bug; it's a bottleneck that threatens your reputation as a high-speed freelancer.

But what if you could offload the diagnostic heavy lifting to a specialized AI agent? By mastering the synergy between Claude Code and Antigravity, you move from manual 'print-debugging' to surgical, AI-assisted remediation. This is the difference between a stressed developer and a high-leverage architect.

steps.title: Initialize Contextual Awareness
steps.description: Establish the project architecture baseline so the agent understands your file structure and dependencies before diagnosing errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory structure and identify the primary entry points and dependency graph. Create a summary map for the debugging agent.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a focused trace report, then feed that specific error signature into Claude Code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a static analysis scan on the target module and output the exact line numbers causing the runtime type mismatch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Analyze the error trace provided by Antigravity in the specific module; suggest a hotfix."

steps.title: Automate Unit Test Regression
steps.description: Before applying a fix, generate a test case that replicates the bug to ensure the solution is verified.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Jest test case that fails when the current bug is present and passes once the fix is applied.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Create a unit test file based on the Antigravity prompt to verify the fix."

steps.title: Execution of Surgical Patch
steps.description: Apply the fix using Claude Code's edit capability, ensuring no side effects occur in related modules.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify the proposed fix against all downstream dependencies to ensure no breaking changes occur.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Apply the verified fix to the codebase and run the test suite."

steps.title: Final Integrity Verification
steps.description: Perform a final automated audit to ensure the codebase remains clean and performant post-patch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a final linting and security check on the modified files to ensure production readiness.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Final audit: Check for any remaining linting issues or performance bottlenecks after the fix."

pro_tips: Always use --mode=read-only first to audit the agent's intent before granting write access to your production branch.
Alias your most frequent Antigravity debug commands in your .zshrc to shave seconds off every diagnostic cycle.
Feed Claude Code your project's CONTRIBUTING.md or style guide to ensure the AI's patches match your existing code patterns.
Use Claude Code's 'memory' feature to store common error patterns encountered in specific client projects for faster future resolution.
When debugging complex state machines, explicitly instruct the AI to draw a mermaid.js flow diagram to visualize the logic failure.
content.next_steps: Integrate your debugging workflow into a CI/CD pipeline so that Claude Code and Antigravity catch regressions before they reach your staging environment.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical edge to turn debugging from a chore into a competitive advantage. Scale your freelance business by shipping faster and cleaner than ever. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
